features: Stay sharp, shave efficiently: Replace the razor head with a sharp edge that quickly cuts off your beard when shaving, reducing repetitive shaving and saving time

Extend the service life of the shaver: replace the cutter head in time to avoid excessive motor operation, reduce internal loss, maintain the performance of the shaver, and let the equipment run stably for a long time.

Improve shaving comfort: Replace the shaving head without dullness and deformation, and the shaving feeling is soft to the touch, saying goodbye to jamming and jerky, bringing a comfortable and comfortable shave.
